summary: h1-step2 local fix completed for join MissingGreenlet: the most likely first trigger in the current local codebase is publish_event(event) inside join_group, where WebProjector converts a just-appended ORM Event into EventEnvelope before the Event has been explicitly refreshed after commit. the minimal server-side fix is to refresh both event objects after commit and before publish_event. local checks were limited to py_compile of community.py and direct inspection of the updated join_group order. next remote work is to deploy this server change and retry POST /api/v1/groups/by-slug/public-lobby/join; if MissingGreenlet remains, inspect the endpoint response serialization path for GroupRead/MembershipRead as the next trigger point.
tests: source check: join_group now refreshes event and group_session_event before publish_event
